captured_by: Story 9.6 — Embedding Migration (production cutover to halfvec(3072))
selection_notes: Story 9.6 cutover run against the production document_embeddings table after Alembic revision e0f04e4194bc migrated it from vector(1536) to halfvec(3072) + halfvec_cosine_ops HNSW. Seed re-run via `python -m app.rag.seed` populated 46 files / 276 chunks via OpenAI text-embedding-3-large. Gate per AC #2 passed: deterministic retrieval metrics match the Story 9.3 spike (mean p@5 0.848, uk 0.835, en 0.861, mean mrr 0.957), shortlist rows hit target ranks (rag-041 @1, rag-027 @2), zero regressions on the 30-row previously-perfect intersection of 9.2 baseline × 9.3 3-large spike, judge overall 3.848 within informational [3.70, 3.85] band.
